description: [ELON] Apply requireAuth() middleware to ALL time-entry routes. Clock-in/out endpoints need employee validation (user can only clock in as themselves unless Owner/Admin). Add geofencing check AFTER auth. Payroll report endpoints require Owner or Admin role.
successCriteria: All routes wrapped with requireAuth middleware
Clock-in validates req.auth.userId matches target employee_id
Geofencing check happens after auth validation
401 errors gone from crawl on /api/time-entries routes
